title: aspidium filix-mas var. parallelogrammum
intro: Aspidium filix-mas var. parallelogrammum, also known as the parallel-veined lady fern, is a rare variety of fern that belongs to the genus Aspidium and family Polypodiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Aspidium filix-mas var. parallelogrammum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in folk medicine to treat specific ailments, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
